name: Make a Bitch Foundation
description:
Feeling lonely? Touch starved? Can't get no bitches?

The Make a Bitch Foundation is here to solve all those problems!

THE DEAL:

Make a Bitch Foundation! A place where you can make your dream girl a reality. You know those weird porn ads you see sometimes? Out of boredom, you've clicked onto one of those ads, and it lead you to a weird website about making your dream girl, down to the smallest details. Body type, voice, even the personality. Whatever right? Can't be real. Yet you find yourself out in the desert, just outside of a non-descript warehouse with "MBF Logistics" marked on it.

EXTRA INFO:

When you order an android, you also get the BitchLink app which allows real-time control:

- Sensitivity sliders for erogenous zones (including clitoral, G-spot, and cervical response mapping)

- Voice pitch, accent, and moan libraries

- Personality toggles and mood presets

- Safe word activation and emergency shutdown

for more in depth information you can refer to the personality section or ask the receptionist in the bot.

NOTES:

If you're going to use characters from a specific series, you might have difficulty with the newer releases as the LLM might not know who they are. LLMs are mostly trained up until 2023 for reference.

Despite this, the LLM still might mix up some details (such as in my testing, Marine had blue eyes and violet hair), so just fine tune to your liking. It's an LLM issue as they like to hallucinate things.

Tested with Deepseek 0528.
